scenarios.title: Browser shows “Not Secure” warning
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 sign in access browser shows not secure warning your browser is showing a security warning or not secure banner when you reach the rapidreconciler url this is almost always one of two things a stale connection your browser is holding from before the certificate was renewed or a genuine certificate problem on the gsi side the first three steps below take a minute and resolve the typical case you only need it for step 4 what you re seeing the browser displays not secure in the address bar or a full warning page your connection isn t private before the login page loads the error code below the message is usually net err_cert_date_invalid net err_cert_authority_invalid or similar common phrasings the site says it s not secure there s a certificate warning or the lock icon is missing a typical edge cert warning red not secure badge in the address bar full warning page and the net err_cert_date_invalid code at the bottom try these steps in order step 1 close edge completely and reopen most cert warnings right after a renewal are caused by edge holding an open connection from before the new cert was deployed a clean restart of edge resolves the typical case close every edge window not just the affected tab reopen edge from the taskbar or start menu visit the rapidreconciler url again warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 hard reload the page force the browser to fetch the page and the certificate fresh with the warning page open press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 try the url in inprivate or a different browser this is the diagnostic that tells you which side the problem is on inprivate uses a fresh session with no cached connections no cookies no extensions and a different browser uses an entirely separate certificate trust store press ctrl shift n to open an inprivate window in edge or open chrome firefox if you have it visit the same url while you re here click the red not secure badge in the address bar to see the certificate details note the valid to date you ll include it in the support email if you need to escalate read the result warning gone in inprivate a different browser it s a stale local cache continue to step 4 or have it do it still warning in inprivate a different browser the certificate is genuinely broken on the gsi side skip step 4 and email rr support directly using the block below worked in inprivate continue to step 4 still warning everywhere skip to the escalation block below step 4 below is for your it if step 3 confirmed the warning is local works in inprivate fails in normal edge the next step is workstation level cache clearing that needs it click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 4 hand off to it for your it when this applies steps 1 3 didn t resolve it but the url works in inprivate or a different browser that means the cert is renewed on the server and the workstation is holding stale state three paths for it to try in order clear the workstation s cached cert ssl state standard browser network state flush windows ssl state reset via internet options and if needed a sweep of the windows cert store and a full edge restart verify the renewed cert is actually live if the workstation cleanup doesn t resolve it the new cert may not be deployed yet or a cdn load balancer reverse proxy in front of the site may still be serving the old one confirm this server received the latest rr agent valc update cert renewals are sometimes accompanied by an agent or valc client update that handles the new cert chain if every other customer environment is working and only this one isn t a missed rollout is a likely cause confirm with rr support that the latest update was installed on this server padlock shows the new cert stop here otherwise escalate to rr support with what was tried still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: User sees no data after login
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 16 2026 blank or missing data user sees no data after login you can sign in but the page is blank or shows no figures the cause is almost always something on your network browser or vpn the steps below resolve most cases without contacting support what you re seeing you log in successfully but the reconciliation inventory or other pages are empty the screen shows i see no data the page is blank or everything is empty common phrasings blank screen on my laptop works for everyone else but me logs in fine on a different computer try these steps in order step 1 check your bookmark url when this applies always check this first it s a 30 second test and a common cause of blank pages your bookmark must point to rapidreconciler getgsi com the root url not a saved deep link to the reconciliation page or any other inner page why it matters if your bookmark goes straight to a deep page and your network password has expired the redirect to the login prompt can fail silently you see a blank page and assume rapidreconciler is down but the real issue is that you never reached the login screen open your bookmark and look at the url bar if it shows anything past rapidreconciler getgsi com a longer path a query string an anchor edit the bookmark to point at the root url re open the bookmark you should land on the login screen if you land on the login screen and your sign in is rejected your password has likely expired reset it the way you normally would for your corporate account then sign in data appears after sign in stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 confirm you re on vpn or the corporate network when this applies you re working remotely from home while travelling or off site rapidreconciler is only reachable from your corporate network or via your organization s vpn if you re disconnected login can succeed but no data will flow if you re working remotely confirm you re connected to your organization s vpn or approved remote access method if you believe you re connected disconnect and reconnect the vpn then hard refresh the browser resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 allow local network access in your browser when this applies your browser was recently updated or this is a new workstation edge and chrome have a permission gate that controls whether sites can connect to local network devices if rapidreconciler isn t on the allowed list all data calls silently fail in edge open settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access under allowed to connect to any device on your local network verify rapidreconciler getgsi com is present if it s missing click add site and add it hard reload the page and check whether data appears chrome has the equivalent setting under its site permissions area edge settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access rapidreconciler getgsi com should appear under allowed to connect to any device on your local network if you can t find or change the setting on your machine ask your it department to adjust it resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 4 step 4 check with coworkers when this applies steps 1 3 didn t fix it ask a coworker whether they can see data in rapidreconciler right now the answer changes what your it will need to investigate pick the option that matches just me coworkers can see data it only happens on my machine or when i log in everyone multiple users in the company can t see data right now got your answer continue to step 5 step 5 contact your it and share what you ve found for your it when this applies steps 1 4 didn t fix it you won t be able to fix this yourself it s a network machine or server issue your it needs to investigate send to your it draft an email to it the body will reflect your answer in step 3 drag your screenshot in before sending generate it email it resolved it you re done otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: RapidReconciler Page won’t load
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 sign in access rapidreconciler page won t load rapidreconciler won t open at all you see this site can t be reached or a similar browser error instead of the login page run the quick check below first if that doesn t fix it the button drafts a note to your it so they can test from their side what you re seeing the login page never appears the request fails before any rapidreconciler content loads common phrasings the page won t load site can t be reached the url is broken try this first step 1 confirm the url and hard refresh the rapidreconciler url is rapidreconciler getgsi com run through these in order check the address bar matches rapidreconciler getgsi com if you opened rr from a saved bookmark update the bookmark to rapidreconciler getgsi com hard refresh the page shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac if the page still won t load draft an email to your it the email asks them to test from a different network and check filtering dns rules send to your it draft an email to it asking them to test the url from a different network and check the corporate filter rules generate it email it resolved it you re done back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: Excel export failures
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 daily jobs exports excel export failures you click export or download on a report and nothing happens no file no error message the rr service has gotten stuck and needs a restart the fix is one click of the in ui restart service button though most end users don t see that button it s administrator only by default so for many it s a quick email to their rr administrator the restart takes about 15 minutes to complete what you re seeing you click export to excel or the download button on a report and nothing happens no file is generated and no error is displayed the export worked normally before then stopped working often after the next session the next day or after an idle period common phrasings the export button does nothing excel download isn t working i can t download my report clicking export gives no response try these steps in order step 1 click restart service or have your admin do it the restart service button resets the rr service it sits in the main navigation panel but it s only visible to administrators and power users an admin has explicitly granted access to most end users won t see it if you see the button click it the restart takes about 15 minutes to complete if you don t see the button most end users email your rr administrator a power user at your organization and ask them to click restart service on your behalf they can do it from anywhere nobody needs to touch the server the restart still takes about 15 minutes once they click it don t see the button draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to click restart service on your behalf generate administrator email continue to step 2 once the restart is in progress step 2 once you have confirmation retry the export wait until the restart is confirmed complete either from clicking the button yourself the restart takes about 15 minutes or from your administrator replying that they re done retry the report that originally failed try one or two other reports to confirm exports are working broadly not just for the one you tried first all exports working done if failures recur later continue to step 3 step 3 if it keeps recurring capture the pattern one restart isn t a problem a pattern of needing one daily or weekly is and the pattern itself is the diagnostic clue support needs note the time since the last restart service track how often the issue recurs next day every few days after long idle etc note whether other users at your site hit the same thing at the same time if the workaround is becoming a regular ritual the deeper fix is a full application server reboot scheduled by your it continue to step 4 pattern captured and recurring continue to step 4 step 4 ask your it for a full application server reboot for your it when this applies the restart service workaround from step 1 only lasts about 24 hours and the export keeps failing the pattern from step 3 means the underlying service is in a bad state that a full server reboot will clear whereas a service only restart only resets it briefly the daily service restart is treating the symptom a full reboot should clear the underlying state and give a more durable fix ask your it to schedule a brief outage on the rapidreconciler application server off hours is best have them perform a full reboot of the server not just a service restart send these steps to your it draft an email pre filled with the steps above and what you ve already tried generate it email once it confirms the reboot is done continue to step 5 step 5 retest after the reboot once it has confirmed the server reboot is done retry your exports over the next day or two including the end of day export that was originally failing if exports work normally and stay working done the pattern from step 3 was real and the full reboot cleared it if exports start failing again within a day or so the underlying issue is deeper than what a reboot can clear still failing continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: Inventory validation light is red
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 16 2026 status lights red inventory validation light is red the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red what this light checks depends on the module you re in inventory and transfers the prior period s ending variance must equal the current period s carry forward on both the gl balance and the variance carry forward po receipts only that the gl balance rolls forward correctly the light is binary red or green never amber and no other message accompanies the colour change the most common cause is unposted gl batches in the prior period most cases resolve once those batches are posted in jde don t start your month end close until both status lights are green what you re seeing the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red common phrasing the red light came on the page header the left hand inventory validation dot is red while system status remains green try these steps in order step 1 look for unposted gl batches in the prior period when this applies always check this first it resolves roughly 80 of cases rapidreconciler tells you whether unposted gl batches from the prior period are driving the red light you ll find this in the variance calculation section on the main reconciliation page change the period selection in the dropdown to the prior period if the page surfaces an unposted batch link next to the variance calculation click that link directly it opens the same pop up in one step otherwise hover the gl batches label to reveal a click icon then click it to open the pop up look at what s listed what you find decides what happens next entries listed those are the unposted batches they need to be posted in jde the inventory validation light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run after the posting no entries unposted batches aren t the cause continue to step 2 batches posted wait for the next refresh cycle then re check the indicator no entries or still red after the refresh continue to step 2 step 2 open the inventory validation report when this applies all prior period batches are confirmed posted but the indicator is still red click the red inventory validation indicator rapidreconciler exports an excel report of the period by period roll forward calculation save the file you ll read from it directly to decide what to do next the inventory validation report each row is summary data for one account in one period multiple periods per account stack vertically and multiple accounts can appear one after another filters on the page determine which accounts and periods are included the glok column tells you whether each period s ending gl balance rolled forward into the next period it takes one of four values baseline the earliest period in the data for that account nothing to compare against yes the prior period s ending balance carried forward correctly no the carry forward failed this is the row you act on end the most current period in the data for that account the varok column applies the same yes no to the variance carry forward if glok is no varok will also be no the gl failure cascades heads up glok and varok can read yes on every row even when the light is red that usually means the broken period is the most current one in the report which shows as end rather than no in that case focus your inspection on the end row and the row immediately before it the carry forward from prior to current is where the gap sits the fixes in step 3 still apply treat the end row as if it were the no row got the excel continue to step 3 to read the result step 3 decide based on what the report shows find the row s where glok no or varok no and follow the matching path what the row shows what to do glok no with a non zero amount in unpostbatch for the prior period post the unposted batches in jde the light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run glok no with a non zero amount in unpostbatch in a period two or more periods in the past the batches are too old for the standard fix email rrsupport getgsi com and attach the excel from step 2 glok no or end with unpostbatch zero on every row run the jde account repost program r099102 in proof mode for the affected account apply any updates the proof report shows the light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run if the row instead shows varok no while glok yes the gl is fine but the variance carry forward broke the fix is for an administrator to use the reroll by company function in companies configuration don t have administrator access draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to run reroll by company generate administrator email resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried be sure to attach the inventory validation report excel from step 2 email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: I can’t log in
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 sign in access i can t log in several things can prevent you from logging in to rapidreconciler the login screen usually shows a note that identifies which one match what you re seeing to the right option below what you re seeing you can t sign in to rapidreconciler the login form rejects your attempt the login screen shows a note explaining the reason password expired incorrect credentials server unavailable or a generic connection error common phrasings it won t let me in i can t logon i forgot my password or the server s down match the message and follow the path option 1 password expired or incorrect credentials when this applies the login note says your password is expired or your credentials are incorrect rapidreconciler passwords must be reset every 90 days whether yours expired or you simply don t remember it the resolution is the same click the forgot password link on the login screen and follow the reset flow if the forgot password flow doesn t reach you no reset email arrives or the reset link doesn t work email your rr administrator and ask them to help forgot password didn t help draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to reset your password generate administrator email got back in stop here option 2 any other login error for your it when this applies the login screen shows anything other than a credentials issue a connectivity error server unavailable or any error message you don t recognise you won t be able to fix this from the login screen yourself it s a workstation network or server issue your it needs to look at take a screenshot of the error message on the login screen email it to your it using the button below drag the screenshot into the email before you send send to your it draft an email to it drag your screenshot in before sending generate it email it resolved it you re done back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: RapidReconciler job running longer than usual
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 16 2026 job won t finish rapidreconciler job running longer than usual you log in at your usual time and the system status light is flashing amber instead of solid green hover over the light the pop up shows how long the current run has been going and the average time it normally takes if the current run is considerably longer than the average the job is stuck on something on the sql server side and your it needs to step in different symptom if the status light is red not flashing amber the job has clearly failed see system status light is red instead what you re seeing the system status light is flashing amber when you log in at your usual time you d normally expect solid green hovering over the light shows a pop up with the current run duration and the average run time the current run is considerably longer than the average common phrasings rr is running long the job didn t finish data isn t updating the light s been amber all morning try this first step 1 confirm the run is considerably longer than the average then contact your it hover over the system status light and read the pop up current run duration how long today s job has been running average run time how long it usually takes to complete if the current run is roughly in line with the average give it a little more time and check back if it s considerably longer than the average the job is stuck on the sql server side draft a note to your it using the button below the email asks them to stop the sql job let it roll back and re run it the standard fix includes the deeper checks if it hangs again and recommends proactive monitoring so your dba can be alerted next time without waiting on gsi to flag it in gsi s experience this is usually a transient timing issue inside sql server the job almost always completes normally on the re run where the sql agent job lives if you have ssms access yourself most customers know you cancel the sql agent job but aren t sure where to click in sql server management studio ssms connect to the rapidreconciler database server then expand sql server agent jobs right click the rapidreconciler job stop job let the rollback finish on its own don t kill the sql server process or restart the service while the rollback is in progress then right click the job again start job at step first step if you don t have ssms access on the server stop here and use the it email button below your dba needs to do this for you send to your it draft an email to it with the standard stop rollback re run procedure the deeper investigation checks and proactive monitoring recommendations pre filled generate it email it resolved it you re done back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: Data looks old and isn’t refreshing
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 stale or wrong data data looks old and isn t refreshing rapidreconciler is showing yesterday s or older figures the system status light in the page header tells you what s going on flashing amber the refresh is running right now just wait red the refresh failed see system status light is red instead green the refresh didn t run when it should have the steps below cover that case what you re seeing rapidreconciler is showing yesterday s or older figures rather than current data you expect a scheduled refresh that hasn t happened other parts of rapidreconciler load and look healthy only the data is old try these steps in order step 1 is the refresh actually overdue when this applies the system status light is green not amber not red hover the status indicators in the page header the tooltip shows the last refresh time there is no separate timestamp printed on the page compare that timestamp against your usual refresh schedule if it s from after the most recent expected refresh today s data is in hard reload the page shift f5 on windows cmd shift r on mac to make sure you re not looking at a cached older version refresh overdue and figures genuinely stale continue to step 2 otherwise stop here this is normal pre refresh behavior hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it or dba click to draft an email generate it email step 2 possible problem with rapidreconciler job for your it when this applies the system status light is green and step 1 confirmed the refresh is overdue that means the job didn t run when it should have not that it failed the refresh runs through a sql agent job on your database server the job name is typically rapidreconciler_prod your environment may use a custom name standard checks for your it or dba in order is the database server up and reachable most didn t run cases are a server that rebooted or went offline is the sql server agent service running open services msc find sql server agent status should be running set the startup type to automatic so the agent comes back up after a server reboot is the job itself enabled in ssms expand sql server agent jobs find rapidreconciler_prod or your custom name right click confirm it s not disabled check the schedule under properties schedules was it edited paused or deleted what does the history show right click the job view history when did it last run if it never ran on the expected schedule the schedule itself is the suspect if a recent run is missing where you d expect one see the previous bullet run it manually to confirm it works right click the job start job at step watch it complete cleanly then re confirm the schedule will fire next cycle let the user know tell the user the refresh is running fresh figures will appear on the page once the job completes once it runs through these job runs and data refreshes stop here job is broken in a way it can t resolve see need help below need help most cases are customer side the sql server the sql agent service and the job schedule all live on a server your it or dba owns rr support can t reach into your environment to start a stopped service or re enable a disabled job if you have a gsi services contract gsi manages your server for you draft an email to rr support and they ll take it from there email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: System status light is red
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 16 2026 status light is red system status light is red you log in and the system status light in the page header is red instead of green that means last night s rapidreconciler job didn t complete cleanly so today s figures aren t reliable don t run your month end close until the light is green again send a screenshot to your it using the button below the email pre fills the checks they ll need different symptom if the light is flashing amber rather than red the job is still running not failed see rapidreconciler job running longer than usual what you re seeing the system status indicator in the page header has turned red the colour is the same on every module it reflects the sql agent job not the page you re on common phrasings system status is red the red light is on the job failed or something crashed reports or scheduled processing didn t complete the way they normally do the page header the right hand system status dot is red while inventory validation remains green try this first step 1 download the system status report and run it through the export analyzer click the red system status light in the page header rapidreconciler downloads a systemstatus_ xlsx report that s the sql agent step log for last night s job open the rapidreconciler export analyzer and drop the file onto step 1 the analyzer detects the system status template automatically and produces a worked up analysis workbook in your browser download the analysis from step 3 the analysis names every failed step every sql error code with the actual sql server cause and resolution every partial cycle and any steps that have gotten noticeably slower over time that gives it a clear starting point instead of a screenshot don t trust completed successfully on the raw report the raw system status generated report can show every step as completed successfully while the status light is still red that s expected the completed successfully line is per step and the red light reflects something the system status check sees that the per step output doesn t surface when the analyzer finds nothing wrong in the log either the truth lives in the sql agent logs on the database server the it email in the next step covers that path analyzer downloaded keep both files the original export and the analysis to attach in the next step step 2 email it the analysis and a screenshot for context draft an email to your it using the button below the email pre fills the sql server ssis checks they ll need to run disk and tempdb sql agent job history and the ssis execution report attach both files from step 1 the analysis workbook system status analysis xlsx and the original systemstatus_ xlsx export the analysis is the primary artifact it tells it exactly which rows to look at a screenshot of the page header showing the red light is optional context if you want one in the email body send to your it draft an email to it with the sql server ssis investigation checklist pre filled drag both files in the analysis workbook first then the original export before sending generate it email it resolved it you re done back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome

scenarios.title: User can’t see newly granted companies
scenarios.data_search: runbook last updated may 15 2026 blank or missing data user can t see newly granted companies your admin granted you access to additional companies but you don t see them in the company selector your browser session is still holding the old narrower permission set logging out and back in then refreshing the widget picks up the new access what you re seeing your admin granted you access to one or more companies but when you click into a tab reconciliation inventory etc you see no companies in the company selector common phrasings i can t see my new company my newly granted companies aren t showing the company dropdown is missing options i should have try these steps in order step 1 log out and back in a fresh login pulls your current security settings from the server and clears whatever the previous session was holding log out of rapidreconciler completely log back in continue to step 2 to refresh the widget step 2 refresh the company selector widget click the refresh icon in the top right corner of the company selector widget filter area on the affected tab the newly granted companies should appear resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk i help us improve found an error a gap or something unclear in this document email rrsupport getgsi com corrections and suggestions are all welcome
